name: HWR_WLNS_DI_SOURCE_VL
query: SELECT B.ID, B.SOURCE_NAME, B.SOURCE_TYPE_ID, B.SOURCE_ID, B.META_DATA, B.SOURCE_CATEGORY, B.SETUP_STATUS, B.IS_ACTIVE, T.NAME, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HWR_WLNS_DI_SOURCE_B B, HWR_WLNS_DI_SOURCE_TL T WHERE B.ID = T.ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
